items.name: Spamton Shop (FOR SPAMTON BODY BUNDLE)
items.description:
THIS ONLY WORKS WELL WITH THE BODY BUNDLE! To get the rest here:

SPAMTON BUNDLE:

https://www.roblox.com/bundles/105944337971421/Spamton-RECOLORABLE

SPAMTON GLOW BUNDLE:

https://www.roblox.com/bundles/211482235537971/Spamton-Cel-Shaded-RECOLORABLE

-----------------------------------------

FOR MORE SPAMTON ITEMS (AND ALSO A SPAMTON BODY BUNDLE WITH ACCURATE EXPRESSIONS):

https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Keyword=Spamton&Category=1&CreatorName=avatarverse&CreatorType=Group&salesTypeFilter=1

For more Deltarune / Undertale stuff, here:

https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Keyword=Deltarune+Undertale&Category=1&CreatorName=avatarverse&CreatorType=Group&salesTypeFilter=1
